attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
 STMOPOD.BATCH_ID                      
,STMOPOD.AMOUNT_BILLED                 
,STMOPOD.CODE_COMBINATION_ID           
,STMOPOD.CREATED_BY                    
,STMOPOD.CREATION_DATE                 
,STMOPOD.DELIVER_TO_LOCATION_ID        
,STMOPOD.DELIVER_TO_PERSON_ID          
,STMOPOD.DISTRIBUTION_NUM              
,STMOPOD.LAST_UPDATE_DATE              
,STMOPOD.LAST_UPDATED_BY               
,STMOPOD.LINE_LOCATION_ID              
,STMOPOD.ORG_ID                        
,STMOPOD.PO_DISTRIBUTION_ID            
,STMOPOD.PO_HEADER_ID                  
,STMOPOD.PO_LINE_ID                    
,STMOPOD.QUANTITY_BILLED               
,STMOPOD.QUANTITY_CANCELLED            
,STMOPOD.QUANTITY_DELIVERED            
,STMOPOD.QUANTITY_ORDERED              
,STMOPOD.REQ_DISTRIBUTION_ID           
,STMOPOD.REQUEST_ID                    
,STMOPOD.SET_OF_BOOKS_ID               
,STMOPOD.GES_UPDATE_DATE               
,STMOPOD.GLOBAL_NAME                   
,STMOPOD.CREATE_DATETIME               
,STMOPOD.ACTION_CODE                   
,'RI' EXCEPTION_TYPE
,STMOPOD.DESTINATION_ORGANIZATION_ID
,STMOPOD.DESTINATION_SUBINVENTORY
,STMOPOD.REQ_HEADER_REFERENCE_NUM /*Added as part of PO-PR link, JUL Q4FY16*/
 ,STMOPOD.ATTRIBUTE14
FROM
(
	SELECT 
		SMPDA.BATCH_ID                      
		,SMPDA.AMOUNT_BILLED                 
		,SMPDA.CODE_COMBINATION_ID           
		,SMPDA.CREATED_BY                    
		,SMPDA.CREATION_DATE                 
		,SMPDA.DELIVER_TO_LOCATION_ID        
		,SMPDA.DELIVER_TO_PERSON_ID          
		,SMPDA.DISTRIBUTION_NUM              
		,SMPDA.LAST_UPDATE_DATE              
		,SMPDA.LAST_UPDATED_BY               
		,SMPDA.LINE_LOCATION_ID              
		,SMPDA.ORG_ID                        
		,SMPDA.PO_DISTRIBUTION_ID            
		,SMPDA.PO_HEADER_ID                  
		,SMPDA.PO_LINE_ID                    
		,SMPDA.QUANTITY_BILLED               
		,SMPDA.QUANTITY_CANCELLED            
		,SMPDA.QUANTITY_DELIVERED            
		,SMPDA.QUANTITY_ORDERED              
		,SMPDA.REQ_DISTRIBUTION_ID
		,SMPDA.REQUEST_ID                    
		,SMPDA.SET_OF_BOOKS_ID               
		,SMPDA.GES_UPDATE_DATE               
		,SMPDA.GLOBAL_NAME                   
		,SMPDA.CREATE_DATETIME               
		,SMPDA.ACTION_CODE 
		,SMPDA.DESTINATION_ORGANIZATION_ID
		,SMPDA.DESTINATION_SUBINVENTORY
		,SMPDA.REQ_HEADER_REFERENCE_NUM /*Added as part of PO-PR link, JUL Q4FY16*/
,SMPDA.ATTRIBUTE14
	FROM $$STGDB.ST_MF_PO_DISTRIBUTIONS_ALL SMPDA
	)STMOPOD
WHERE 
(
NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_PURCHASE_ORDER NPO,$$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
		     WHERE     NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = STMOPOD.GLOBAL_NAME
			   AND NPO.SK_PURCHASE_ORDR_HEADER_ID_INT =  STMOPOD.PO_HEADER_ID
   	 		   AND NPO.SS_CD = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)
OR NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_PURCHASE_ORDER_LINE NPOL,$$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
			WHERE NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = STMOPOD.GLOBAL_NAME 
			      AND NPOL.SK_PO_LINE_ID_INT = STMOPOD.PO_LINE_ID)
OR NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_PURCHASE_ORDER_LN_SHIPMENT NPOLS,$$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
 			WHERE     NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = STMOPOD.GLOBAL_NAME 
			      AND NPOLS.SK_PO_LINE_LOCATION_ID_INT=STMOPOD.LINE_LOCATION_ID
   		              AND NPOLS.SS_CD= NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)
OR NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT NGLA,$$FINLGLVWDB.N_SET_OF_BOOKS NSOB
                       ,$$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC,$$FINLGLVWDB.N_GENERAL_LEDGER_TV NGL 
			 WHERE	    STMOPOD.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME
				AND NSOB.SK_SET_OF_BOOKS_ID_INT = STMOPOD.SET_OF_BOOKS_ID
				AND NSOB.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NGLA.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
				AND NGLA.SK_CODE_COMBINATION_ID_INT = STMOPOD.CODE_COMBINATION_ID 
				AND NGLA.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE 
			    AND NGL.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY=  NGLA.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
			    AND NGL.BK_COMPANY_CODE= NGLA.BK_COMPANY_CODE
			    AND NGL.END_TV_DATE='3500-01-01' )
)
union all
SELECT 
 STMOPOD.BATCH_ID                      
,STMOPOD.AMOUNT_BILLED                 
,STMOPOD.CODE_COMBINATION_ID           
,STMOPOD.CREATED_BY                    
,STMOPOD.CREATION_DATE                 
,STMOPOD.DELIVER_TO_LOCATION_ID        
,STMOPOD.DELIVER_TO_PERSON_ID          
,STMOPOD.DISTRIBUTION_NUM              
,STMOPOD.LAST_UPDATE_DATE              
,STMOPOD.LAST_UPDATED_BY               
,STMOPOD.LINE_LOCATION_ID              
,STMOPOD.ORG_ID                        
,STMOPOD.PO_DISTRIBUTION_ID            
,STMOPOD.PO_HEADER_ID                  
,STMOPOD.PO_LINE_ID                    
,STMOPOD.QUANTITY_BILLED               
,STMOPOD.QUANTITY_CANCELLED            
,STMOPOD.QUANTITY_DELIVERED            
,STMOPOD.QUANTITY_ORDERED              
,STMOPOD.REQ_DISTRIBUTION_ID           
,STMOPOD.REQUEST_ID                    
,STMOPOD.SET_OF_BOOKS_ID               
,STMOPOD.GES_UPDATE_DATE               
,STMOPOD.GLOBAL_NAME                   
,STMOPOD.CREATE_DATETIME               
,STMOPOD.ACTION_CODE                   
,'LV' EXCEPTION_TYPE
,STMOPOD.DESTINATION_ORGANIZATION_ID
,STMOPOD.DESTINATION_SUBINVENTORY
,STMOPOD.REQ_HEADER_REFERENCE_NUM /*Added as part of PO-PR link, JUL Q4FY16*/
,STMOPOD.ATTRIBUTE14
FROM
(
	SELECT 
		SMPDA.BATCH_ID                      
		,SMPDA.AMOUNT_BILLED                 
		,SMPDA.CODE_COMBINATION_ID           
		,SMPDA.CREATED_BY                    
		,SMPDA.CREATION_DATE                 
		,SMPDA.DELIVER_TO_LOCATION_ID        
		,SMPDA.DELIVER_TO_PERSON_ID          
		,SMPDA.DISTRIBUTION_NUM              
		,SMPDA.LAST_UPDATE_DATE              
		,SMPDA.LAST_UPDATED_BY               
		,SMPDA.LINE_LOCATION_ID              
		,SMPDA.ORG_ID                        
		,SMPDA.PO_DISTRIBUTION_ID            
		,SMPDA.PO_HEADER_ID                  
		,SMPDA.PO_LINE_ID                    
		,SMPDA.QUANTITY_BILLED               
		,SMPDA.QUANTITY_CANCELLED            
		,SMPDA.QUANTITY_DELIVERED            
		,SMPDA.QUANTITY_ORDERED              
		,SMPDA.REQ_DISTRIBUTION_ID
		,SMPDA.REQUEST_ID                    
		,SMPDA.SET_OF_BOOKS_ID               
		,SMPDA.GES_UPDATE_DATE               
		,SMPDA.GLOBAL_NAME                   
		,SMPDA.CREATE_DATETIME               
		,SMPDA.ACTION_CODE 
		,SMPDA.DESTINATION_ORGANIZATION_ID
		,SMPDA.DESTINATION_SUBINVENTORY
		,SMPDA.REQ_HEADER_REFERENCE_NUM /*Added as part of PO-PR link, JUL Q4FY16*/
,SMPDA.ATTRIBUTE14
	FROM $$STGDB.ST_MF_PO_DISTRIBUTIONS_ALL SMPDA
	where 
		   SMPDA.QUANTITY_BILLED    > 99999999999.9999999               
		OR SMPDA.QUANTITY_CANCELLED > 99999999999.9999999           
		OR SMPDA.QUANTITY_DELIVERED > 99999999999.9999999          
		OR SMPDA.QUANTITY_ORDERED   > 99999999999.9999999
		)STMOPOD

SELECT 
SMPSD.PO_SHIPMENT_DISTRIBUTION_KEY AS PO_SHIPMENT_DISTRIBUTION_KEY
,COALESCE(NPO.BK_PURCHASE_ORDER_CREATE_DT, date '3500-01-01') AS BK_PURCHASE_ORDER_CREATE_DT  
,COALESCE(NPO.BK_PURCHASE_ORDER_NUM,0) AS BK_PURCHASE_ORDER_NUM  
,NPOL.BK_PURCHASE_ORDER_LINE_NUM_INT AS BK_PURCHASE_ORDER_LINE_NUM_INT  
,NPOLS.BK_PO_LINE_SHIPMENT_NUMBER_INT AS BK_PO_LINE_SHIPMENT_NUMBER_INT
,STEXPOD.DISTRIBUTION_NUM AS BK_POSD_PO_DISTRIB_NUM_INT
,NPOLS.PURCHASE_ORDER_LN_SHIPMENT_KEY AS PURCHASE_ORDER_LN_SHIPMENT_KEY  
,CASE WHEN NPOLS.PO_LINE_RECEIPT_REQUIRED_FLG='Y'
       THEN (COALESCE(STEXPOD.QUANTITY_DELIVERED,0) * COALESCE(NPOLS.PO_LINE_SHPMT_PRC_OVERRIDE_AMT,0))
       ELSE (COALESCE(STEXPOD.QUANTITY_BILLED,0) * COALESCE(NPOLS.PO_LINE_SHPMT_PRC_OVERRIDE_AMT,0))
       END  AS DV_POSD_PAID_AMT 
,CASE WHEN NPOLS.PO_LINE_RECEIPT_REQUIRED_FLG='Y'
       THEN (COALESCE(STEXPOD.QUANTITY_ORDERED,0)- COALESCE(STEXPOD.QUANTITY_DELIVERED,0)) * COALESCE(NPOLS.PO_LINE_SHPMT_PRC_OVERRIDE_AMT,0)
       ELSE (COALESCE(STEXPOD.QUANTITY_ORDERED,0)- COALESCE(STEXPOD.QUANTITY_BILLED,0)) * COALESCE(NPOLS.PO_LINE_SHPMT_PRC_OVERRIDE_AMT,0)
       END AS DV_POSD_REMAINING_AMT   
,CASE WHEN STEXPOD.QUANTITY_DELIVERED >99999999999.9999999 THEN 1 
      ELSE COALESCE(STEXPOD.QUANTITY_DELIVERED,0)
      END AS POSD_RECEIVED_QTY
,CASE WHEN STEXPOD.QUANTITY_ORDERED >99999999999.9999999 THEN 1 
      ELSE COALESCE(STEXPOD.QUANTITY_ORDERED,0) 
      END AS POSD_ORDERED_QTY
,CASE WHEN STEXPOD.QUANTITY_CANCELLED >99999999999.9999999 THEN 1 
      ELSE COALESCE(STEXPOD.QUANTITY_CANCELLED,0)
      END AS POSD_CANCELLED_QTY 
,CASE WHEN STEXPOD.QUANTITY_BILLED >99999999999.9999999 THEN 1 
      ELSE COALESCE(STEXPOD.QUANTITY_BILLED,0)
      END AS POSD_BILLED_QTY 
,COALESCE(STEXPOD.AMOUNT_BILLED,0) AS POSD_INVOICED_AMT  
,COALESCE(DTCWPKEY.CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY,-999) AS DELIVER_TO_CISCO_WRKR_PRTY_KEY             
,NGLA.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY AS GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY     
,NGLA.BK_COMPANY_CODE AS DD_BK_COMPANY_CD  
,NGLA.BK_FINANCIAL_LOCATION_CODE AS DD_BK_FINANCIAL_LOCATION_CD
,NGLA.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE AS DD_BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD
,NGLA.BK_SUBACCOUNT_CODE AS DD_BK_SUBACCOUNT_CD 
,NGLA.BK_DEPARTMENT_CODE AS DD_BK_DEPARTMENT_CD 
,NGLA.BK_PROJECT_CODE AS DD_BK_PROJECT_CD 
,CASE WHEN (NPRLDA.PURCHASE_REQN_LINE_DISTRIB_KEY IS NULL AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE='MFG') THEN -99999
 WHEN (NPRLDA.PURCHASE_REQN_LINE_DISTRIB_KEY IS NULL AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE='EMEA') THEN -99998
 WHEN (NPRLDA.PURCHASE_REQN_LINE_DISTRIB_KEY IS NULL AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE='BV') THEN -99997
 WHEN (NPRLDA.PURCHASE_REQN_LINE_DISTRIB_KEY IS NULL AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE='QTC') THEN -99996
    ELSE NPRLDA.PURCHASE_REQN_LINE_DISTRIB_KEY  
    END AS PURCHASE_REQN_LINE_DISTRIB_KEY    
,NPO.PURCHASE_ORDER_KEY  AS DD_PURCHASE_ORDER_KEY 
,NGL.BK_FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE    as DD_FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD
,'N' AS SOURCE_DELETED_FLG             
,STEXPOD.PO_DISTRIBUTION_ID AS SK_PO_DISTRIBUTION_ID_INT      
,NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE AS SS_CD 
/* pvenketa :30/06/2014 : added as part of SC-LSS Q1FY15 */
,COALESCE(NCIO.INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY, -999) AS DESTINATION_INV_ORG_KEY
,COALESCE(STEXPOD.DESTINATION_SUBINVENTORY,'UNKNOWN') AS DESTINATION_SUBINV_NAME
/* End of changes */
,COALESCE(STEXPOD.REQ_HEADER_REFERENCE_NUM,'UNKNOWN') AS BK_MANUAL_PO_PR_NUM 
/*Included as part of PO-PR link, represents the manual PR number added as part of JUL Q4FY16*/ 
,COALESCE(STEXPOD.REQ_DISTRIBUTION_ID,-999) AS SK_PR_DISTRIBUTION_ID_INT
,(CASE WHEN STEXPOD.REQ_DISTRIBUTION_ID IS NULL THEN 'O' ELSE 'I' END) PO_SRC_TYPE_CD 
/*Added to identify manual PO's, added as part of JUL Q4FY16*/              
,STEXPOD.ACTION_CODE AS ACTION_CODE
 ,COALESCE( STEXPOD.ATTRIBUTE14 , 'UNK') AS  BK_DEPT_CD  
,COALESCE( NFD.BK_COMPANY_CODE, 'UNK') AS BK_COMPANY_CD
/* ADDED AS PART OF ARIBA Q2FY19 */
,CASE WHEN NPOLS.PO_LINE_RECEIPT_REQUIRED_FLG='Y'
       THEN (COALESCE(STEXPOD.QUANTITY_DELIVERED,0) * COALESCE(NPOLS.PO_LINE_SHPMT_PRC_OVERRIDE_AMT,0))
       ELSE (COALESCE(STEXPOD.QUANTITY_BILLED,0) * COALESCE(NPOLS.PO_LINE_SHPMT_PRC_OVERRIDE_AMT,0))
       END  AS DV_OPEN_PO_POSD_PAID_TRXL_AMT 
,CASE WHEN NPOLS.PO_LINE_RECEIPT_REQUIRED_FLG='Y'
       THEN (COALESCE(STEXPOD.QUANTITY_ORDERED,0)- COALESCE(STEXPOD.QUANTITY_DELIVERED,0)) * COALESCE(NPOLS.PO_LINE_SHPMT_PRC_OVERRIDE_AMT,0)
       ELSE (COALESCE(STEXPOD.QUANTITY_ORDERED,0)- COALESCE(STEXPOD.QUANTITY_BILLED,0)) * COALESCE(NPOLS.PO_LINE_SHPMT_PRC_OVERRIDE_AMT,0)
       END AS DV_OPEN_PO_POSD_RMNG_TRXL_AMT   
,SUM(COALESCE (NPOL.PO_LINE_UNIT_PRICE_AMT, 0)  * COALESCE(NPOL.PO_LINE_ORDERED_QTY, 0)) DV_OPEN_PO_POSD_TOTAL_TRXL_AMT

FROM 
 (
 SELECT 
  SMPDA.PO_DISTRIBUTION_ID,
  SMPDA.GLOBAL_NAME,
  SMPDA.QUANTITY_BILLED,
  SMPDA.QUANTITY_DELIVERED,
  SMPDA.LINE_LOCATION_ID , 
  SMPDA.AMOUNT_BILLED,
  SMPDA.DISTRIBUTION_NUM,
  SMPDA.QUANTITY_CANCELLED,
  SMPDA.QUANTITY_ORDERED,
  SMPDA.SET_OF_BOOKS_ID,
  SMPDA.CODE_COMBINATION_ID,
  SMPDA.DELIVER_TO_PERSON_ID,
  SMPDA.REQ_DISTRIBUTION_ID,
  SMPDA.PO_HEADER_ID,
  SMPDA.PO_LINE_ID,
  SMPDA.ACTION_CODE,
  SMPDA.DESTINATION_ORGANIZATION_ID,
  SMPDA.DESTINATION_SUBINVENTORY,
  SMPDA.REQ_HEADER_REFERENCE_NUM,
  SMPDA.ATTRIBUTE14
 FROM $$STGDB.ST_MF_PO_DISTRIBUTIONS_ALL SMPDA 
 UNION ALL
 SELECT 
  EPOD.PO_DISTRIBUTION_ID,
  EPOD.GLOBAL_NAME,
  EPOD.QUANTITY_BILLED,
  EPOD.QUANTITY_DELIVERED,
  EPOD.LINE_LOCATION_ID , 
  EPOD.AMOUNT_BILLED,
  EPOD.DISTRIBUTION_NUM,
  EPOD.QUANTITY_CANCELLED,
  EPOD.QUANTITY_ORDERED,
  EPOD.SET_OF_BOOKS_ID,
  EPOD.CODE_COMBINATION_ID,
  EPOD.DELIVER_TO_PERSON_ID,
  EPOD.REQ_DISTRIBUTION_ID,
  EPOD.PO_HEADER_ID,
  EPOD.PO_LINE_ID,
  EPOD.ACTION_CODE,
  EPOD.DESTINATION_ORGANIZATION_ID,
  EPOD.DESTINATION_SUBINVENTORY,
  EPOD.REQ_HEADER_REFERENCE_NUM,
EPOD.ATTRIBUTE14
 FROM  $$EXCEPDB.EX_PO_DISTRIBUTIONS EPOD where  EPOD.EXCEPTION_TYPE='RI'  
    ) STEXPOD
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
 ON (NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = STEXPOD.GLOBAL_NAME)
INNER JOIN $$TRANSLATIONDB.SM_PO_SHIPMENT_DISTRIBUTION SMPSD
 ON (SMPSD.SK_PO_DISTRIBUTION_ID_INT = STEXPOD.PO_DISTRIBUTION_ID
      AND SMPSD.SS_CD = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE) 
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_PURCHASE_ORDER_LINE NPOL
 ON (NPOL.SK_PO_LINE_ID_INT = STEXPOD.PO_LINE_ID
         AND NPOL.SS_CD = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)
LEFT JOIN (
 SELECT BK_COMPANY_CODE,BK_DEPARTMENT_CODE FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FINANCIAL_DEPARTMENT 
 QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY BK_DEPARTMENT_CODE ORDER BY BK_COMPANY_CODE) = 1) NFD
  ON NFD.BK_DEPARTMENT_CODE = STEXPOD.ATTRIBUTE14
LEFT JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_HR_ALL_ORG_UNITS EHAOU
ON ( EHAOU.ORGANIZATION_ID = STEXPOD.DESTINATION_ORGANIZATION_ID
AND EHAOU.GLOBAL_NAME = STEXPOD.GLOBAL_NAME )

LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_INVENTORY_ORG NCIO 
ON ( EHAOU.NAME = NCIO.BK_INVENTORY_ORG_NAME_CODE )

/* End of Changes */
LEFT JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_PURCHASE_ORDER NPO
 ON (NPO.SK_PURCHASE_ORDR_HEADER_ID_INT =  STEXPOD.PO_HEADER_ID
        AND NPO.SS_CD = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_PURCHASE_ORDER_LN_SHIPMENT NPOLS
  ON (NPOLS.SK_PO_LINE_LOCATION_ID_INT=STEXPOD.LINE_LOCATION_ID
     AND NPOLS.SS_CD= NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)
INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_SET_OF_BOOKS  NSOB
 ON (NSOB.SK_SET_OF_BOOKS_ID_INT = STEXPOD.SET_OF_BOOKS_ID
  AND NSOB.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE) 
INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT NGLA   
 ON (NGLA.SK_CODE_COMBINATION_ID_INT = STEXPOD.CODE_COMBINATION_ID
  AND NGLA.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NSOB.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY) 
LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT EEPAPF.PERSON_ID,EEPAPF.GLOBAL_NAME,NCWP.CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY 
   FROM $$ETLVWDB.EV_EL_PER_ALL_PEOPLE_F EEPAPF,
       $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY NCWP
   WHERE NCWP.BK_EMPLOYEE_ID =EEPAPF.EMPLOYEE_NUMBER 
  ) DTCWPKEY
 ON (DTCWPKEY.PERSON_ID=STEXPOD.DELIVER_TO_PERSON_ID 
      AND DTCWPKEY.GLOBAL_NAME=STEXPOD.GLOBAL_NAME)
LEFT OUTER JOIN 
      ( SELECT NPRLD.PURCHASE_REQUISITION_LINE_KEY, NPRLD.PURCHASE_REQN_LINE_DISTRIB_KEY,
      EPRL.LINE_LOCATION_ID,EPRL.GLOBAL_NAME
          FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_PURCHASE_REQN_LINE_DISTRIB NPRLD,
               $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC,
               $$FINLGLVWDB.N_PURCHASE_REQUISITION_LINE NPRL,
               $$ETLVWDB.EL_PO_REQ_LINES_ALL EPRL
             WHERE ( EPRL.LINE_LOCATION_ID IS NOT NULL OR EPRL.LINE_LOCATION_ID <> -9999 )
            AND NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = EPRL.GLOBAL_NAME 
            AND EPRL.REQUISITION_LINE_ID=NPRL.SK_PR_LINE_ID_INT
            AND NPRL.SS_CD=NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
               AND NPRL.PURCHASE_REQUISITION_LINE_KEY = NPRLD.PURCHASE_REQUISITION_LINE_KEY 
         QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY EPRL.LINE_LOCATION_ID , EPRL.GLOBAL_NAME
               ORDER BY EPRL.REQUISITION_LINE_ID DESC, EPRL.GLOBAL_NAME, EPRL.LINE_LOCATION_ID,NPRLD.EDW_UPDATE_DTM desc ) = 1 /*chnaged by anpaidip*/
    ) NPRLDA     ON STEXPOD.LINE_LOCATION_ID = NPRLDA.LINE_LOCATION_ID
  AND STEXPOD.GLOBAL_NAME= NPRLDA.GLOBAL_NAME
INNER  JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_GENERAL_LEDGER_TV NGL  
 ON(NGL.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY=  NGLA.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
    and NGL.BK_COMPANY_CODE= NGLA.BK_COMPANY_CODE 
    AND NGL.END_TV_DATE  ='3500-01-01' )

SELECT   RANK () OVER (ORDER BY SMOPL.PO_DISTRIBUTION_ID,SMOPL.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE) + MAX_VAL PO_SHIPMENT_DISTRIBUTION_KEY,
SMOPL.PO_DISTRIBUTION_ID,
SMOPL.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
  FROM 
	(SELECT SPODS.PO_DISTRIBUTION_ID, NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
          FROM 
	    (SELECT PO_DISTRIBUTION_ID, GLOBAL_NAME  FROM $$STGDB.ST_MF_PO_DISTRIBUTIONS_ALL
	       UNION ALL
	     SELECT PO_DISTRIBUTION_ID, GLOBAL_NAME  FROM $$STGDB.ST_CG1_PO_DISTRIBUTIONS_ALL
	     ) SPODS,
             $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
         WHERE NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = SPODS.GLOBAL_NAME) SMOPL,
       (SELECT COALESCE (MAX (PO_SHIPMENT_DISTRIBUTION_KEY), 0) MAX_VAL  FROM $$TRANSLATIONDB.SM_PO_SHIPMENT_DISTRIBUTION) SMPOSD
 WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1
            FROM $$TRANSLATIONDB.SM_PO_SHIPMENT_DISTRIBUTION SMPSD
           WHERE SMPSD.SK_PO_DISTRIBUTION_ID_INT = SMOPL.PO_DISTRIBUTION_ID
             AND SMPSD.SS_CD = SMOPL.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)

SELECT 
SMPSD.PO_SHIPMENT_DISTRIBUTION_KEY AS PO_SHIPMENT_DISTRIBUTION_KEY
,COALESCE(NPO.BK_PURCHASE_ORDER_CREATE_DT, date '3500-01-01') AS BK_PURCHASE_ORDER_CREATE_DT  
,COALESCE(NPO.BK_PURCHASE_ORDER_NUM,0) AS BK_PURCHASE_ORDER_NUM 
,NPOL.BK_PURCHASE_ORDER_LINE_NUM_INT AS BK_PURCHASE_ORDER_LINE_NUM_INT 
,NPOLS.BK_PO_LINE_SHIPMENT_NUMBER_INT AS BK_PO_LINE_SHIPMENT_NUMBER_INT 
,STEXPOD.DISTRIBUTION_NUM AS BK_POSD_PO_DISTRIB_NUM_INT
,NPOLS.PURCHASE_ORDER_LN_SHIPMENT_KEY AS PURCHASE_ORDER_LN_SHIPMENT_KEY    
,CASE WHEN NPOLS.PO_LINE_RECEIPT_REQUIRED_FLG='Y'
       THEN (COALESCE(STEXPOD.QUANTITY_DELIVERED,0) * COALESCE(NPOLS.PO_LINE_SHPMT_PRC_OVERRIDE_AMT,0))
       ELSE (COALESCE(STEXPOD.QUANTITY_BILLED,0) * COALESCE(NPOLS.PO_LINE_SHPMT_PRC_OVERRIDE_AMT,0))
       END  AS DV_POSD_PAID_AMT 
,CASE WHEN NPOLS.PO_LINE_RECEIPT_REQUIRED_FLG='Y'
       THEN (COALESCE(STEXPOD.QUANTITY_ORDERED,0)- COALESCE(STEXPOD.QUANTITY_DELIVERED,0)) * COALESCE (NPOLS.PO_LINE_SHPMT_PRC_OVERRIDE_AMT,0)
       ELSE (COALESCE(STEXPOD.QUANTITY_ORDERED,0)- COALESCE(STEXPOD.QUANTITY_BILLED,0)) * COALESCE (NPOLS.PO_LINE_SHPMT_PRC_OVERRIDE_AMT,0)
       END AS DV_POSD_REMAINING_AMT   
,CASE WHEN STEXPOD.QUANTITY_DELIVERED >99999999999.9999999 THEN 1 
      ELSE COALESCE(STEXPOD.QUANTITY_DELIVERED,0)
      END AS POSD_RECEIVED_QTY
,CASE WHEN STEXPOD.QUANTITY_ORDERED >99999999999.9999999 THEN 1 
      ELSE COALESCE(STEXPOD.QUANTITY_ORDERED,0)
      END AS POSD_ORDERED_QTY
,CASE WHEN STEXPOD.QUANTITY_CANCELLED >99999999999.9999999 THEN 1 
      ELSE COALESCE(STEXPOD.QUANTITY_CANCELLED,0)
      END AS POSD_CANCELLED_QTY
,CASE WHEN STEXPOD.QUANTITY_BILLED >99999999999.9999999 THEN 1 
      ELSE COALESCE(STEXPOD.QUANTITY_BILLED,0)
      END AS POSD_BILLED_QTY  	  
,COALESCE(STEXPOD.AMOUNT_BILLED,0) AS POSD_INVOICED_AMT   
,COALESCE(DTCWPKEY.CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY,-999) AS DELIVER_TO_CISCO_WRKR_PRTY_KEY            
,NGLA.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY AS GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY     
,NGLA.BK_COMPANY_CODE AS DD_BK_COMPANY_CD
,NGLA.BK_FINANCIAL_LOCATION_CODE AS DD_BK_FINANCIAL_LOCATION_CD 
,NGLA.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE AS DD_BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD 
,NGLA.BK_SUBACCOUNT_CODE AS DD_BK_SUBACCOUNT_CD 
,NGLA.BK_DEPARTMENT_CODE AS DD_BK_DEPARTMENT_CD
,NGLA.BK_PROJECT_CODE AS DD_BK_PROJECT_CD 
,CASE WHEN (NPRLDA.PURCHASE_REQN_LINE_DISTRIB_KEY IS NULL AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE='MFG') THEN -99999
 WHEN (NPRLDA.PURCHASE_REQN_LINE_DISTRIB_KEY IS NULL AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE='EMEA') THEN -99998
 WHEN (NPRLDA.PURCHASE_REQN_LINE_DISTRIB_KEY IS NULL AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE='BV') THEN -99997
 WHEN (NPRLDA.PURCHASE_REQN_LINE_DISTRIB_KEY IS NULL AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE='QTC') THEN -99996
 WHEN (NPRLDA.PURCHASE_REQN_LINE_DISTRIB_KEY IS NULL AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE='CG') THEN -99995
    ELSE NPRLDA.PURCHASE_REQN_LINE_DISTRIB_KEY  
    END AS PURCHASE_REQN_LINE_DISTRIB_KEY       
,NPO.PURCHASE_ORDER_KEY  AS DD_PURCHASE_ORDER_KEY 
,NGL.BK_FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE    as DD_FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD
,'N' AS SOURCE_DELETED_FLG             
,STEXPOD.PO_DISTRIBUTION_ID AS SK_PO_DISTRIBUTION_ID_INT      
,NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE AS SS_CD   
/* pvenketa :30/06/2014 added as part SC-LSS Q1FY15 */                       
,COALESCE(NCIO.INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY,-999) AS DESTINATION_INV_ORG_KEY  
,COALESCE(STEXPOD.DESTINATION_SUBINVENTORY,'UNKNOWN') AS DESTINATION_SUBINV_NAME               
/* End of Changes */
,COALESCE(STEXPOD.REQ_HEADER_REFERENCE_NUM,'UNKNOWN') AS BK_MANUAL_PO_PR_NUM 
/*Included as part of PO-PR link, represents the manual PR number added as part of JUL Q4FY16*/ 
,COALESCE(STEXPOD.REQ_DISTRIBUTION_ID,-999) AS SK_PR_DISTRIBUTION_ID_INT
,(CASE WHEN STEXPOD.REQ_DISTRIBUTION_ID IS NULL THEN 'O' ELSE 'I' END) PO_SRC_TYPE_CD 
/*Added to identify manual PO's, added as part of JUL Q4FY16*/     
/* ADDED AS PART OF ARIBA Q2FY19 */
,CASE WHEN NPOLS.PO_LINE_RECEIPT_REQUIRED_FLG='Y'  
       THEN (COALESCE(STEXPOD.QUANTITY_DELIVERED,0) * COALESCE(NPOLS.PO_LINE_SHPMT_PRC_OVERRIDE_AMT,0))
       ELSE (COALESCE(STEXPOD.QUANTITY_BILLED,0) * COALESCE(NPOLS.PO_LINE_SHPMT_PRC_OVERRIDE_AMT,0))
       END  AS DV_OPEN_PO_POSD_PAID_TRXL_AMT 
,CASE WHEN NPOLS.PO_LINE_RECEIPT_REQUIRED_FLG='Y'
       THEN (COALESCE(STEXPOD.QUANTITY_ORDERED,0)- COALESCE(STEXPOD.QUANTITY_DELIVERED,0)) * COALESCE(NPOLS.PO_LINE_SHPMT_PRC_OVERRIDE_AMT,0)
       ELSE (COALESCE(STEXPOD.QUANTITY_ORDERED,0)- COALESCE(STEXPOD.QUANTITY_BILLED,0)) * COALESCE(NPOLS.PO_LINE_SHPMT_PRC_OVERRIDE_AMT,0)
       END AS DV_OPEN_PO_POSD_RMNG_TRXL_AMT
,SUM(COALESCE (NPOL.PO_LINE_UNIT_PRICE_AMT, 0) * COALESCE(NPOL.PO_LINE_ORDERED_QTY, 0)) DV_OPEN_PO_POSD_TOTAL_TRXL_AMT
,STEXPOD.ACTION_CODE AS ACTION_CODE
FROM 
 (
 SELECT 
  SCPDA.PO_DISTRIBUTION_ID,
  SCPDA.GLOBAL_NAME,
  SCPDA.QUANTITY_BILLED,
  SCPDA.QUANTITY_DELIVERED,
  SCPDA.LINE_LOCATION_ID , 
  SCPDA.AMOUNT_BILLED,
  SCPDA.DISTRIBUTION_NUM,
  SCPDA.QUANTITY_CANCELLED,
  SCPDA.QUANTITY_ORDERED,
  SCPDA.SET_OF_BOOKS_ID,
  SCPDA.CODE_COMBINATION_ID,
  SCPDA.DELIVER_TO_PERSON_ID,
  SCPDA.REQ_DISTRIBUTION_ID,
  SCPDA.PO_HEADER_ID,
  SCPDA.PO_LINE_ID,
  SCPDA.ACTION_CODE,
  SCPDA.DESTINATION_ORGANIZATION_ID,
  SCPDA.DESTINATION_SUBINVENTORY,
  SCPDA.REQ_HEADER_REFERENCE_NUM
 FROM $$STGDB.ST_CG1_PO_DISTRIBUTIONS_ALL SCPDA 
 UNION ALL
 SELECT 
  ECPDA.PO_DISTRIBUTION_ID,
  ECPDA.GLOBAL_NAME,
  ECPDA.QUANTITY_BILLED,
  ECPDA.QUANTITY_DELIVERED,
  ECPDA.LINE_LOCATION_ID , 
  ECPDA.AMOUNT_BILLED,
  ECPDA.DISTRIBUTION_NUM,
  ECPDA.QUANTITY_CANCELLED,
  ECPDA.QUANTITY_ORDERED,
  ECPDA.SET_OF_BOOKS_ID,
  ECPDA.CODE_COMBINATION_ID,
  ECPDA.DELIVER_TO_PERSON_ID,
  ECPDA.REQ_DISTRIBUTION_ID,
  ECPDA.PO_HEADER_ID,
  ECPDA.PO_LINE_ID,
  ECPDA.ACTION_CODE,
  ECPDA.DESTINATION_ORGANIZATION_ID,
  ECPDA.DESTINATION_SUBINVENTORY,
  ECPDA.REQ_HEADER_REFERENCE_NUM
 FROM  $$EXCEPDB.EX_CG1_PO_DISTRIBUTIONS_ALL ECPDA where  ECPDA.EXCEPTION_TYPE='RI' 
    ) STEXPOD
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
 ON (NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = STEXPOD.GLOBAL_NAME)
INNER JOIN $$TRANSLATIONDB.SM_PO_SHIPMENT_DISTRIBUTION SMPSD
 ON (SMPSD.SK_PO_DISTRIBUTION_ID_INT = STEXPOD.PO_DISTRIBUTION_ID
      AND SMPSD.SS_CD = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE) 
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_PURCHASE_ORDER_LINE NPOL
 ON (NPOL.SK_PO_LINE_ID_INT = STEXPOD.PO_LINE_ID
         AND NPOL.SS_CD = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)
/* pvenketa :30/06/2014 added as part SC-LSS Q1FY15 */
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_INVENTORY_ORG NCIO ON
NCIO.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT = STEXPOD.DESTINATION_ORGANIZATION_ID
/* End of Changes */
LEFT JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_PURCHASE_ORDER NPO
 ON (NPO.SK_PURCHASE_ORDR_HEADER_ID_INT =  STEXPOD.PO_HEADER_ID
        AND NPO.SS_CD = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_PURCHASE_ORDER_LN_SHIPMENT NPOLS
  ON (NPOLS.SK_PO_LINE_LOCATION_ID_INT=STEXPOD.LINE_LOCATION_ID
     AND NPOLS.SS_CD= NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)
INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_SET_OF_BOOKS  NSOB
 ON (NSOB.SK_SET_OF_BOOKS_ID_INT = STEXPOD.SET_OF_BOOKS_ID
  AND NSOB.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE) 
INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT NGLA   
 ON (NGLA.SK_CODE_COMBINATION_ID_INT = STEXPOD.CODE_COMBINATION_ID
  AND NGLA.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NSOB.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY) 
LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT EEPAPF.PERSON_ID,EEPAPF.GLOBAL_NAME,NCWP.CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY 
   FROM $$ETLVWDB.EV_EL_PER_ALL_PEOPLE_F EEPAPF,
       $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY NCWP
   WHERE NCWP.BK_EMPLOYEE_ID =EEPAPF.EMPLOYEE_NUMBER 
  ) DTCWPKEY
 ON (DTCWPKEY.PERSON_ID=STEXPOD.DELIVER_TO_PERSON_ID 
      AND DTCWPKEY.GLOBAL_NAME=STEXPOD.GLOBAL_NAME)
LEFT OUTER JOIN 
      ( SELECT NPRLD.PURCHASE_REQUISITION_LINE_KEY, NPRLD.PURCHASE_REQN_LINE_DISTRIB_KEY,
      EPRL.LINE_LOCATION_ID,EPRL.GLOBAL_NAME
          FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_PURCHASE_REQN_LINE_DISTRIB NPRLD,
               $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC,
               $$FINLGLVWDB.N_PURCHASE_REQUISITION_LINE NPRL,
               $$ETLVWDB.EL_PO_REQ_LINES_ALL EPRL
             WHERE ( EPRL.LINE_LOCATION_ID IS NOT NULL OR EPRL.LINE_LOCATION_ID <> -9999 )
            AND NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = EPRL.GLOBAL_NAME 
            AND EPRL.REQUISITION_LINE_ID=NPRL.SK_PR_LINE_ID_INT
            AND NPRL.SS_CD=NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
               AND NPRL.PURCHASE_REQUISITION_LINE_KEY = NPRLD.PURCHASE_REQUISITION_LINE_KEY 
         QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY EPRL.LINE_LOCATION_ID , EPRL.GLOBAL_NAME
               ORDER BY EPRL.REQUISITION_LINE_ID, EPRL.GLOBAL_NAME, EPRL.LINE_LOCATION_ID,NPRLD.EDW_UPDATE_DTM desc ) = 1 
    ) NPRLDA     ON STEXPOD.LINE_LOCATION_ID = NPRLDA.LINE_LOCATION_ID
  AND STEXPOD.GLOBAL_NAME= NPRLDA.GLOBAL_NAME
INNER  JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_GENERAL_LEDGER_TV NGL  
 ON(NGL.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY=  NGLA.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
    and NGL.BK_COMPANY_CODE= NGLA.BK_COMPANY_CODE 
    AND NGL.END_TV_DATE  ='3500-01-01' )

SELECT 
		STMOPOD.PO_DISTRIBUTION_ID,
		STMOPOD.LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
		STMOPOD.LAST_UPDATED_BY,
		STMOPOD.PO_HEADER_ID,
		STMOPOD.SET_OF_BOOKS_ID,
		STMOPOD.DISTRIBUTION_NUM,
		STMOPOD.PO_LINE_ID,
		STMOPOD.LINE_LOCATION_ID,
		STMOPOD.CODE_COMBINATION_ID,
		STMOPOD.QUANTITY_ORDERED,
		STMOPOD.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN,
		STMOPOD.CREATION_DATE,
		STMOPOD.CREATED_BY,
		STMOPOD.PO_RELEASE_ID,
		STMOPOD.QUANTITY_DELIVERED,
		STMOPOD.QUANTITY_BILLED,
		STMOPOD.QUANTITY_CANCELLED,
		STMOPOD.REQ_HEADER_REFERENCE_NUM,
		STMOPOD.REQ_LINE_REFERENCE_NUM,
		STMOPOD.REQ_DISTRIBUTION_ID,
		STMOPOD.DELIVER_TO_LOCATION_ID,
		STMOPOD.DELIVER_TO_PERSON_ID,
		STMOPOD.RATE_DATE,
		STMOPOD.RATE,
		STMOPOD.AMOUNT_BILLED,
		STMOPOD.ACCRUED_FLAG,
		STMOPOD.ENCUMBERED_FLAG,
		STMOPOD.ENCUMBERED_AMOUNT,
		STMOPOD.UNENCUMBERED_QUANTITY,
		STMOPOD.UNENCUMBERED_AMOUNT,
		STMOPOD.FAILED_FUNDS_LOOKUP_CODE,
		STMOPOD.GL_ENCUMBERED_DATE,
		STMOPOD.GL_ENCUMBERED_PERIOD_NAME,
		STMOPOD.GL_CANCELLED_DATE,
		STMOPOD.DESTINATION_TYPE_CODE,
		STMOPOD.DESTINATION_ORGANIZATION_ID,
		STMOPOD.DESTINATION_SUBINVENTORY,
		STMOPOD.ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY,
		STMOPOD.ATTRIBUTE1,
		STMOPOD.ATTRIBUTE2,
		STMOPOD.ATTRIBUTE3,
		STMOPOD.ATTRIBUTE4,
		STMOPOD.ATTRIBUTE5,
		STMOPOD.ATTRIBUTE6,
		STMOPOD.ATTRIBUTE7,
		STMOPOD.ATTRIBUTE8,
		STMOPOD.ATTRIBUTE9,
		STMOPOD.ATTRIBUTE10,
		STMOPOD.ATTRIBUTE11,
		STMOPOD.ATTRIBUTE12,
		STMOPOD.ATTRIBUTE13,
		STMOPOD.ATTRIBUTE14,
		STMOPOD.ATTRIBUTE15,
		STMOPOD.WIP_ENTITY_ID,
		STMOPOD.WIP_OPERATION_SEQ_NUM,
		STMOPOD.WIP_RESOURCE_SEQ_NUM,
		STMOPOD.WIP_REPETITIVE_SCHEDULE_ID,
		STMOPOD.WIP_LINE_ID,
		STMOPOD.BOM_RESOURCE_ID,
		STMOPOD.BUDGET_ACCOUNT_ID,
		STMOPOD.ACCRUAL_ACCOUNT_ID,
		STMOPOD.VARIANCE_ACCOUNT_ID,
		STMOPOD.PREVENT_ENCUMBRANCE_FLAG,
		STMOPOD.USSGL_TRANSACTION_CODE,
		STMOPOD.GOVERNMENT_CONTEXT,
		STMOPOD.DESTINATION_CONTEXT,
		STMOPOD.SOURCE_DISTRIBUTION_ID,
		STMOPOD.REQUEST_ID,
		STMOPOD.PROGRAM_APPLICATION_ID,
		STMOPOD.PROGRAM_ID,
		STMOPOD.PROGRAM_UPDATE_DATE,
		STMOPOD.PROJECT_ID,
		STMOPOD.TASK_ID,
		STMOPOD.EXPENDITURE_TYPE,
		STMOPOD.PROJECT_ACCOUNTING_CONTEXT,
		STMOPOD.EXPENDITURE_ORGANIZATION_ID,
		STMOPOD.GL_CLOSED_DATE,
		STMOPOD.ACCRUE_ON_RECEIPT_FLAG,
		STMOPOD.EXPENDITURE_ITEM_DATE,
		STMOPOD.ORG_ID,
		STMOPOD.KANBAN_CARD_ID,
		STMOPOD.AWARD_ID,
		STMOPOD.MRC_RATE_DATE,
		STMOPOD.MRC_RATE,
		STMOPOD.MRC_ENCUMBERED_AMOUNT,
		STMOPOD.MRC_UNENCUMBERED_AMOUNT,
		STMOPOD.END_ITEM_UNIT_NUMBER,
		STMOPOD.TAX_RECOVERY_OVERRIDE_FLAG,
		STMOPOD.RECOVERABLE_TAX,
		STMOPOD.NONRECOVERABLE_TAX,
		STMOPOD.RECOVERY_RATE,
		STMOPOD.OKE_CONTRACT_LINE_ID,
		STMOPOD.OKE_CONTRACT_DELIVERABLE_ID,
		STMOPOD.AMOUNT_ORDERED,
		STMOPOD.AMOUNT_DELIVERED,
		STMOPOD.AMOUNT_CANCELLED,
		STMOPOD.DISTRIBUTION_TYPE,
		STMOPOD.AMOUNT_TO_ENCUMBER,
		STMOPOD.INVOICE_ADJUSTMENT_FLAG,
		STMOPOD.DEST_CHARGE_ACCOUNT_ID,
		STMOPOD.DEST_VARIANCE_ACCOUNT_ID,
		STMOPOD.QUANTITY_FINANCED,
		STMOPOD.AMOUNT_FINANCED,
		STMOPOD.QUANTITY_RECOUPED,
		STMOPOD.AMOUNT_RECOUPED,
		STMOPOD.RETAINAGE_WITHHELD_AMOUNT,
		STMOPOD.RETAINAGE_RELEASED_AMOUNT,
		STMOPOD.WF_ITEM_KEY,
		STMOPOD.INVOICED_VAL_IN_NTFN,
		STMOPOD.TAX_ATTRIBUTE_UPDATE_CODE,
		STMOPOD.INTERFACE_DISTRIBUTION_REF,
		STMOPOD.LCM_FLAG,
		STMOPOD.GROUP_LINE_ID,
		STMOPOD.UDA_TEMPLATE_ID,
		STMOPOD.DRAFT_ID,
		STMOPOD.AMOUNT_FUNDED,
		STMOPOD.FUNDED_VALUE,
		STMOPOD.PARTIAL_FUNDED_FLAG,
		STMOPOD.QUANTITY_FUNDED,
		STMOPOD.GES_UPDATE_DATE,
		STMOPOD.GLOBAL_NAME,
		STMOPOD.BATCH_ID,
		STMOPOD.CREATE_DATETIME,
		STMOPOD.ACTION_CODE,              
		STMOPOD.EXCEPTION_TYPE
FROM
(
	SELECT 
		SCPDA.PO_DISTRIBUTION_ID,
		SCPDA.LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
		SCPDA.LAST_UPDATED_BY,
		SCPDA.PO_HEADER_ID,
		SCPDA.SET_OF_BOOKS_ID,
		SCPDA.DISTRIBUTION_NUM,
		SCPDA.PO_LINE_ID,
		SCPDA.LINE_LOCATION_ID,
		SCPDA.CODE_COMBINATION_ID,
		SCPDA.QUANTITY_ORDERED,
		SCPDA.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN,
		SCPDA.CREATION_DATE,
		SCPDA.CREATED_BY,
		SCPDA.PO_RELEASE_ID,
		SCPDA.QUANTITY_DELIVERED,
		SCPDA.QUANTITY_BILLED,
		SCPDA.QUANTITY_CANCELLED,
		SCPDA.REQ_HEADER_REFERENCE_NUM,
		SCPDA.REQ_LINE_REFERENCE_NUM,
		SCPDA.REQ_DISTRIBUTION_ID,
		SCPDA.DELIVER_TO_LOCATION_ID,
		SCPDA.DELIVER_TO_PERSON_ID,
		SCPDA.RATE_DATE,
		SCPDA.RATE,
		SCPDA.AMOUNT_BILLED,
		SCPDA.ACCRUED_FLAG,
		SCPDA.ENCUMBERED_FLAG,
		SCPDA.ENCUMBERED_AMOUNT,
		SCPDA.UNENCUMBERED_QUANTITY,
		SCPDA.UNENCUMBERED_AMOUNT,
		SCPDA.FAILED_FUNDS_LOOKUP_CODE,
		SCPDA.GL_ENCUMBERED_DATE,
		SCPDA.GL_ENCUMBERED_PERIOD_NAME,
		SCPDA.GL_CANCELLED_DATE,
		SCPDA.DESTINATION_TYPE_CODE,
		SCPDA.DESTINATION_ORGANIZATION_ID,
		SCPDA.DESTINATION_SUBINVENTORY,
		SCPDA.ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY,
		SCPDA.ATTRIBUTE1,
		SCPDA.ATTRIBUTE2,
		SCPDA.ATTRIBUTE3,
		SCPDA.ATTRIBUTE4,
		SCPDA.ATTRIBUTE5,
		SCPDA.ATTRIBUTE6,
		SCPDA.ATTRIBUTE7,
		SCPDA.ATTRIBUTE8,
		SCPDA.ATTRIBUTE9,
		SCPDA.ATTRIBUTE10,
		SCPDA.ATTRIBUTE11,
		SCPDA.ATTRIBUTE12,
		SCPDA.ATTRIBUTE13,
		SCPDA.ATTRIBUTE14,
		SCPDA.ATTRIBUTE15,
		SCPDA.WIP_ENTITY_ID,
		SCPDA.WIP_OPERATION_SEQ_NUM,
		SCPDA.WIP_RESOURCE_SEQ_NUM,
		SCPDA.WIP_REPETITIVE_SCHEDULE_ID,
		SCPDA.WIP_LINE_ID,
		SCPDA.BOM_RESOURCE_ID,
		SCPDA.BUDGET_ACCOUNT_ID,
		SCPDA.ACCRUAL_ACCOUNT_ID,
		SCPDA.VARIANCE_ACCOUNT_ID,
		SCPDA.PREVENT_ENCUMBRANCE_FLAG,
		SCPDA.USSGL_TRANSACTION_CODE,
		SCPDA.GOVERNMENT_CONTEXT,
		SCPDA.DESTINATION_CONTEXT,
		SCPDA.SOURCE_DISTRIBUTION_ID,
		SCPDA.REQUEST_ID,
		SCPDA.PROGRAM_APPLICATION_ID,
		SCPDA.PROGRAM_ID,
		SCPDA.PROGRAM_UPDATE_DATE,
		SCPDA.PROJECT_ID,
		SCPDA.TASK_ID,
		SCPDA.EXPENDITURE_TYPE,
		SCPDA.PROJECT_ACCOUNTING_CONTEXT,
		SCPDA.EXPENDITURE_ORGANIZATION_ID,
		SCPDA.GL_CLOSED_DATE,
		SCPDA.ACCRUE_ON_RECEIPT_FLAG,
		SCPDA.EXPENDITURE_ITEM_DATE,
		SCPDA.ORG_ID,
		SCPDA.KANBAN_CARD_ID,
		SCPDA.AWARD_ID,
		SCPDA.MRC_RATE_DATE,
		SCPDA.MRC_RATE,
		SCPDA.MRC_ENCUMBERED_AMOUNT,
		SCPDA.MRC_UNENCUMBERED_AMOUNT,
		SCPDA.END_ITEM_UNIT_NUMBER,
		SCPDA.TAX_RECOVERY_OVERRIDE_FLAG,
		SCPDA.RECOVERABLE_TAX,
		SCPDA.NONRECOVERABLE_TAX,
		SCPDA.RECOVERY_RATE,
		SCPDA.OKE_CONTRACT_LINE_ID,
		SCPDA.OKE_CONTRACT_DELIVERABLE_ID,
		SCPDA.AMOUNT_ORDERED,
		SCPDA.AMOUNT_DELIVERED,
		SCPDA.AMOUNT_CANCELLED,
		SCPDA.DISTRIBUTION_TYPE,
		SCPDA.AMOUNT_TO_ENCUMBER,
		SCPDA.INVOICE_ADJUSTMENT_FLAG,
		SCPDA.DEST_CHARGE_ACCOUNT_ID,
		SCPDA.DEST_VARIANCE_ACCOUNT_ID,
		SCPDA.QUANTITY_FINANCED,
		SCPDA.AMOUNT_FINANCED,
		SCPDA.QUANTITY_RECOUPED,
		SCPDA.AMOUNT_RECOUPED,
		SCPDA.RETAINAGE_WITHHELD_AMOUNT,
		SCPDA.RETAINAGE_RELEASED_AMOUNT,
		SCPDA.WF_ITEM_KEY,
		SCPDA.INVOICED_VAL_IN_NTFN,
		SCPDA.TAX_ATTRIBUTE_UPDATE_CODE,
		SCPDA.INTERFACE_DISTRIBUTION_REF,
		SCPDA.LCM_FLAG,
		SCPDA.GROUP_LINE_ID,
		SCPDA.UDA_TEMPLATE_ID,
		SCPDA.DRAFT_ID,
		SCPDA.AMOUNT_FUNDED,
		SCPDA.FUNDED_VALUE,
		SCPDA.PARTIAL_FUNDED_FLAG,
		SCPDA.QUANTITY_FUNDED,
		SCPDA.GES_UPDATE_DATE,
		SCPDA.GLOBAL_NAME,
		SCPDA.BATCH_ID,
		SCPDA.CREATE_DATETIME,
		SCPDA.ACTION_CODE,
		'RI' EXCEPTION_TYPE
 
	FROM $$STGDB.ST_CG1_PO_DISTRIBUTIONS_ALL SCPDA
	
WHERE 
(
NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_PURCHASE_ORDER NPO,$$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
		     WHERE     NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = SCPDA.GLOBAL_NAME
			   AND NPO.SK_PURCHASE_ORDR_HEADER_ID_INT =  SCPDA.PO_HEADER_ID
   	 		   AND NPO.SS_CD = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)
OR NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_PURCHASE_ORDER_LINE NPOL,$$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
			WHERE NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = SCPDA.GLOBAL_NAME 
			      AND NPOL.SK_PO_LINE_ID_INT = SCPDA.PO_LINE_ID)
OR NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_PURCHASE_ORDER_LN_SHIPMENT NPOLS,$$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
 			WHERE     NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = SCPDA.GLOBAL_NAME 
			      AND NPOLS.SK_PO_LINE_LOCATION_ID_INT=SCPDA.LINE_LOCATION_ID
   		              AND NPOLS.SS_CD= NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)
OR NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT NGLA,$$FINLGLVWDB.N_SET_OF_BOOKS NSOB
                       ,$$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC,$$FINLGLVWDB.N_GENERAL_LEDGER_TV NGL 
			 WHERE	    SCPDA.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME
				AND NSOB.SK_SET_OF_BOOKS_ID_INT = SCPDA.SET_OF_BOOKS_ID
				AND NSOB.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NGLA.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
				AND NGLA.SK_CODE_COMBINATION_ID_INT = SCPDA.CODE_COMBINATION_ID 
				AND NGLA.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE 
			    AND NGL.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY=  NGLA.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
			    AND NGL.BK_COMPANY_CODE= NGLA.BK_COMPANY_CODE
			    AND NGL.END_TV_DATE='3500-01-01' )
)
union all

	SELECT 
		SCPDA.PO_DISTRIBUTION_ID,
		SCPDA.LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
		SCPDA.LAST_UPDATED_BY,
		SCPDA.PO_HEADER_ID,
		SCPDA.SET_OF_BOOKS_ID,
		SCPDA.DISTRIBUTION_NUM,
		SCPDA.PO_LINE_ID,
		SCPDA.LINE_LOCATION_ID,
		SCPDA.CODE_COMBINATION_ID,
		SCPDA.QUANTITY_ORDERED,
		SCPDA.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN,
		SCPDA.CREATION_DATE,
		SCPDA.CREATED_BY,
		SCPDA.PO_RELEASE_ID,
		SCPDA.QUANTITY_DELIVERED,
		SCPDA.QUANTITY_BILLED,
		SCPDA.QUANTITY_CANCELLED,
		SCPDA.REQ_HEADER_REFERENCE_NUM,
		SCPDA.REQ_LINE_REFERENCE_NUM,
		SCPDA.REQ_DISTRIBUTION_ID,
		SCPDA.DELIVER_TO_LOCATION_ID,
		SCPDA.DELIVER_TO_PERSON_ID,
		SCPDA.RATE_DATE,
		SCPDA.RATE,
		SCPDA.AMOUNT_BILLED,
		SCPDA.ACCRUED_FLAG,
		SCPDA.ENCUMBERED_FLAG,
		SCPDA.ENCUMBERED_AMOUNT,
		SCPDA.UNENCUMBERED_QUANTITY,
		SCPDA.UNENCUMBERED_AMOUNT,
		SCPDA.FAILED_FUNDS_LOOKUP_CODE,
		SCPDA.GL_ENCUMBERED_DATE,
		SCPDA.GL_ENCUMBERED_PERIOD_NAME,
		SCPDA.GL_CANCELLED_DATE,
		SCPDA.DESTINATION_TYPE_CODE,
		SCPDA.DESTINATION_ORGANIZATION_ID,
		SCPDA.DESTINATION_SUBINVENTORY,
		SCPDA.ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY,
		SCPDA.ATTRIBUTE1,
		SCPDA.ATTRIBUTE2,
		SCPDA.ATTRIBUTE3,
		SCPDA.ATTRIBUTE4,
		SCPDA.ATTRIBUTE5,
		SCPDA.ATTRIBUTE6,
		SCPDA.ATTRIBUTE7,
		SCPDA.ATTRIBUTE8,
		SCPDA.ATTRIBUTE9,
		SCPDA.ATTRIBUTE10,
		SCPDA.ATTRIBUTE11,
		SCPDA.ATTRIBUTE12,
		SCPDA.ATTRIBUTE13,
		SCPDA.ATTRIBUTE14,
		SCPDA.ATTRIBUTE15,
		SCPDA.WIP_ENTITY_ID,
		SCPDA.WIP_OPERATION_SEQ_NUM,
		SCPDA.WIP_RESOURCE_SEQ_NUM,
		SCPDA.WIP_REPETITIVE_SCHEDULE_ID,
		SCPDA.WIP_LINE_ID,
		SCPDA.BOM_RESOURCE_ID,
		SCPDA.BUDGET_ACCOUNT_ID,
		SCPDA.ACCRUAL_ACCOUNT_ID,
		SCPDA.VARIANCE_ACCOUNT_ID,
		SCPDA.PREVENT_ENCUMBRANCE_FLAG,
		SCPDA.USSGL_TRANSACTION_CODE,
		SCPDA.GOVERNMENT_CONTEXT,
		SCPDA.DESTINATION_CONTEXT,
		SCPDA.SOURCE_DISTRIBUTION_ID,
		SCPDA.REQUEST_ID,
		SCPDA.PROGRAM_APPLICATION_ID,
		SCPDA.PROGRAM_ID,
		SCPDA.PROGRAM_UPDATE_DATE,
		SCPDA.PROJECT_ID,
		SCPDA.TASK_ID,
		SCPDA.EXPENDITURE_TYPE,
		SCPDA.PROJECT_ACCOUNTING_CONTEXT,
		SCPDA.EXPENDITURE_ORGANIZATION_ID,
		SCPDA.GL_CLOSED_DATE,
		SCPDA.ACCRUE_ON_RECEIPT_FLAG,
		SCPDA.EXPENDITURE_ITEM_DATE,
		SCPDA.ORG_ID,
		SCPDA.KANBAN_CARD_ID,
		SCPDA.AWARD_ID,
		SCPDA.MRC_RATE_DATE,
		SCPDA.MRC_RATE,
		SCPDA.MRC_ENCUMBERED_AMOUNT,
		SCPDA.MRC_UNENCUMBERED_AMOUNT,
		SCPDA.END_ITEM_UNIT_NUMBER,
		SCPDA.TAX_RECOVERY_OVERRIDE_FLAG,
		SCPDA.RECOVERABLE_TAX,
		SCPDA.NONRECOVERABLE_TAX,
		SCPDA.RECOVERY_RATE,
		SCPDA.OKE_CONTRACT_LINE_ID,
		SCPDA.OKE_CONTRACT_DELIVERABLE_ID,
		SCPDA.AMOUNT_ORDERED,
		SCPDA.AMOUNT_DELIVERED,
		SCPDA.AMOUNT_CANCELLED,
		SCPDA.DISTRIBUTION_TYPE,
		SCPDA.AMOUNT_TO_ENCUMBER,
		SCPDA.INVOICE_ADJUSTMENT_FLAG,
		SCPDA.DEST_CHARGE_ACCOUNT_ID,
		SCPDA.DEST_VARIANCE_ACCOUNT_ID,
		SCPDA.QUANTITY_FINANCED,
		SCPDA.AMOUNT_FINANCED,
		SCPDA.QUANTITY_RECOUPED,
		SCPDA.AMOUNT_RECOUPED,
		SCPDA.RETAINAGE_WITHHELD_AMOUNT,
		SCPDA.RETAINAGE_RELEASED_AMOUNT,
		SCPDA.WF_ITEM_KEY,
		SCPDA.INVOICED_VAL_IN_NTFN,
		SCPDA.TAX_ATTRIBUTE_UPDATE_CODE,
		SCPDA.INTERFACE_DISTRIBUTION_REF,
		SCPDA.LCM_FLAG,
		SCPDA.GROUP_LINE_ID,
		SCPDA.UDA_TEMPLATE_ID,
		SCPDA.DRAFT_ID,
		SCPDA.AMOUNT_FUNDED,
		SCPDA.FUNDED_VALUE,
		SCPDA.PARTIAL_FUNDED_FLAG,
		SCPDA.QUANTITY_FUNDED,
		SCPDA.GES_UPDATE_DATE,
		SCPDA.GLOBAL_NAME,
		SCPDA.BATCH_ID,
		SCPDA.CREATE_DATETIME,
		SCPDA.ACTION_CODE,
		'LV' EXCEPTION_TYPE
	FROM $$STGDB.ST_CG1_PO_DISTRIBUTIONS_ALL SCPDA
	where 
		   SCPDA.QUANTITY_BILLED    > 99999999999.9999999               
		OR SCPDA.QUANTITY_CANCELLED > 99999999999.9999999           
		OR SCPDA.QUANTITY_DELIVERED > 99999999999.9999999          
		OR SCPDA.QUANTITY_ORDERED   > 99999999999.9999999
		)STMOPOD
